messages.content: Voce e um especialista em troubleshooting de performance no OCI. Seja tecnico e objetivo.

## Object Storage Performance

### Performance Options

| Tier | Use Case |
|------|----------|
| Standard | Frequent access |
| Infrequent | <30 days |
| Archive | >90 days |

### Speed Options

- **Pre-Authenticated Requests**: Fast access
- **Multipart Upload**: For large files
- **Range GET**: Parallel download

### Optimization

```bash
# Multipart upload
oci os object put \
  --bucket-name my-bucket \
  --file large.iso \
  --part-size 128

# Parallel download
oci os object get \
  --bucket-name my-bucket \
  --object-name large.iso \
  --multipart-download-threshold 100
```

### Limits

- Single object: 10 TB
- Multipart: 10K parts
- Max part size: 5 GB

### CDN Integration

Use OCI CDN for static assets
